description_long: This is a dark gray felt fedora hat with a medium-width, slightly upturned brim and a rounded, indented crown. The hat features a darker hatband encircling the base of the crown, which is adorned with a single, prominent gold circular decorative element on one side. The felt material gives the hat a soft, matte appearance with a subtle texture. The crown is gently pinched at the front, creating a classic fedora silhouette. The brim is consistent in width and curves gently upward at the edges, providing both style and shade. The overall design is elegant and suitable for urban fashion, blending traditional and modern elements.
description: A dark gray felt fedora hat with a rounded, indented crown, a medium upturned brim, and a gold circular accent on the hatband. The surface is soft and matte, with a classic urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded, indented crown and the medium-width brim, with the gold accent partially visible on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gold circular decorative element on the hatband and the gentle upward curve of the brim.
description_view_2: Rear view with the gold accent barely visible on the left, showing the continuous hatband and the smooth, rounded crown.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no visible decorative element, focusing on the hat's clean lines and upturned brim.
